hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '(rm|truncate|DROP|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM)' | grep -E '(lecercle\.db|wallet_transactions|rakeback_|accounting_entries|player_game_deals)' >/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: command targets the production DB or a money-critical table. Confirm with Baki out-of-band first.' >&2; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '(getPlayerBalance|getWalletPnL|cashout|wallet_mère|wallet_mere)' >/dev/null; then echo 'NOTE: change touches money-critical code. Run the money-auditor subagent before declaring done.' >&2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '^git push' >/dev/null; then echo 'REMINDER: deploy verification — curl -s https://lecerclepoker-production.up.railway.app/api/version and match against git rev-parse HEAD before telling Baki to test.' >&2; fi
